description.zh: 支持 ENA 直连并行下载 + NCBI prefetch 下载，以及本地 .sra 直接拆分为 FASTQ。
description.en: Supports ENA direct download, NCBI prefetch download, plus local .sra to FASTQ splitting.
High throughput sequence QC report generation.
description.zh: 针对高通量测序数据生成质量控制报告
基于 Cutadapt 和 FastQC 的自动化质量控制工具，支持接头去除、质量修剪、长度过滤，自动进行 FastQC 质控分析。⚠️ 注意：长度阈值建议根据测序读长设置（如 PE150 可设 50 或 36）。
description.en: Automated QC tool based on Cutadapt and FastQC. Supports adapter removal, quality trimming, and length filtering with automatic FastQC analysis. ⚠️ Note: Set length threshold based on read length (e.g., 50 or 36 for PE150).

description.zh: Illumina 单/双端测序数据质控修剪工具，支持接头去除、滑动窗口修剪、质量修剪等多种步骤
description.en: A flexible read trimming tool for Illumina NGS data, supporting adapter clipping, sliding window trimming, quality trimming and more

description.zh: 为参考基因组建立索引文件，便于后续比对 (支持批量)
description.en: Build genome index files for downstream alignment (batch support)

description.zh: 使用HISAT2 将 reads 比对到参考基因组 (输出 sorted.bam)
description.en: Align reads using HISAT2 (Outputs sorted.bam)

description.zh: 从 FASTA 参考基因组序列构建 Bowtie2 比对所需的二进制索引文件
description.en: Build Bowtie2 binary index files from a FASTA reference genome.

description.zh: 使用本地 Bowtie2 将 reads 比对到参考基因组 (输出 sorted.bam)
description.en: Align reads using local Bowtie2 (Outputs sorted.bam)

description.zh: 批量组装识别生物学重复并合并 (输出每个样品的 Merged GTF)
description.en: Batch assembly, identification of biological replicates and merging (output Merged GTF for each sample)

description.zh: 批量处理多个 BAM，输出单样本定量结果，并可生成标准的 Count/FPKM/TPM 表达矩阵
description.en: Batch BAM quantification with per-sample results and detailed Count/FPKM/TPM expression matrices

description.zh: 基于 BAM 和 GTF/SAF 计算表达量。支持属性类型大小写模糊匹配，自动适配不同来源的注释文件
description.en: Count reads mapped to genomic features. Supports case-insensitive attribute matching for various annotation sources.

description.zh: 执行 M个受体 x N个配体的全排列对接 (AutoDock Vina)
description.en: M receptors x N ligands matrix docking (AutoDock Vina)

description.zh: 批量拆分 PDBQT 文件：支持同时拖入多个结果文件
description.en: Batch split PDBQT files into individual ligands

description.zh: 对蛋白-配体复合物进行 PLIP 互作分析，输出文本报告、结构文件与汇总表。与PLIP官网一致。
description.en: Run PLIP on protein-ligand complex structures and export interaction reports and summary files. Consistent with the PLIP official.

description.zh: 计算孔径并自动生成 VMD 实体模型 (Solid Surface)
description.en: Calculate pore radius and generate VMD solid surface model

description.zh: 基于序列的蛋白质功能注释与结构域预测。含有12g左右的数据库
description.en: Protein function annotation and domain prediction. Include 12g database.

description.zh: 基于 eggNOG 数据库的功能注释。含有30G左右的数据库。
description.en: Functional annotation based on eggNOG database. Include 12g database.

description.zh: 使用 Jalview 进行多序列比对可视化。点击运行即可打开 Jalview 原生界面，支持 FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm 等多种格式。
description.en: Visualize multiple sequence alignments with Jalview. Click run to launch the native Jalview GUI. Supports FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm formats.

name.zh: FigTree 系统发育树可视化

description.zh: 使用 FigTree 进行系统发育树可视化。点击运行即可打开 FigTree 原生界面，支持 NEXUS/Newick 等常见树格式。
description.en: Visualize phylogenetic trees with FigTree. Click run to launch the native FigTree GUI. Supports NEXUS/Newick formats.

name.zh: PearTree 系统发育树可视化

description.zh: 基于 Web 的系统发育树交互式查看器，支持树文件加载、缩放、搜索、注释等操作。支持 Newick/Nexus 等格式。
description.en: Web-based interactive phylogenetic tree viewer with zoom, search, annotation and more. Supports Newick/Nexus formats.

description.zh: 高性能多序列比对工具，支持 FFT-NS-2、L-INS-i、G-INS-i、E-INS-i、PartTree 等多种算法策略，适用于蛋白质和核酸序列比对，是构建进化树的首选比对工具。
description.en: High-performance multiple sequence alignment tool with FFT-NS-2, L-INS-i, G-INS-i, E-INS-i, PartTree and other strategies. Ideal for protein and nucleotide alignment before phylogenetic tree construction.

description.zh: 经典的高精度多序列比对工具（MUSCLE v5），支持 PPP 和 Super5 算法，适用于蛋白质和核酸序列，是构建进化树前常用的比对方法。
description.en: Classic high-accuracy multiple sequence alignment tool (MUSCLE v5). Supports PPP and Super5 algorithms for both protein and nucleotide sequences.

description.zh: 对多序列比对 (MSA) 结果进行自动化修剪，去除低质量列和冗余序列，提升下游进化树构建的准确性。
description.en: Automatically trim multiple sequence alignments (MSA) to remove low-quality columns and redundant sequences, improving downstream phylogenetic analysis.

description.zh: 高效的最大似然法进化树构建工具，支持 ModelFinder 自动选模、超快 Bootstrap (UFBoot2)、SH-aLRT 检验等，适合从比对结果直接构建高质量进化树。
description.en: Efficient maximum likelihood phylogenetic tree inference with ModelFinder, ultrafast bootstrap (UFBoot2), SH-aLRT test, and more. Build high-quality trees directly from alignments.

description.zh: 使用 MSA_View 进行多序列比对可视化。支持 FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm 等多种格式的序列比对可视化展示。
description.en: Visualize multiple sequence alignments with MSA_View. Supports visualization of sequence alignments in FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm formats.

description.zh: 使用 BIGfile_View 进行大文本文件预览。支持快速浏览大型文本文件，适用于日志文件、数据文件等大文件的查看。
description.en: Preview large text files with BIGfile_View. Supports quick browsing of large text files, suitable for viewing log files, data files and other large files.

name.zh: 多序列比对与大文件预览工具

description.zh: 双功能工具，集成多序列比对可视化和大文本文件预览功能。支持 FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm 等格式的序列比对可视化，同时支持快速浏览大型文本文件。
description.en: Dual-function tool integrating multiple sequence alignment visualization and large text file preview. Supports alignment visualization in FASTA/Clustal/Stockholm formats, and quick browsing of large text files.

description.zh: 基于 KEGG Orthology 和隐马尔可夫模型的基因功能注释工具，如需更新数据库，请到：https://www.genome.jp/ftp/db/kofam/下载ko_list.gz和profiles.tar.gz，将两个文件放在db文件夹下，并删除.cache文件夹。
description.en: Gene function annotation tool based on KEGG Orthology and HMM, to update database, please download ko_list.gz and profiles.tar.gz from https://www.genome.jp/ftp/db/kofam/ and put them in db folder, then delete .cache folder.
